creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jgh
Date: Fri Jan  3 19:36:06 2014
New Revision: 338576
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/338576

Log:
  - update to 3.1.9 which fixes many minor bugs
  - add download mirror
  - remove redundant option of DOCS
  
  PR:		185451
  Submitted by:	maintainer, ahicks@p-o.co.uk

Modified:
  head/mail/dbmail/Makefile
  head/mail/dbmail/distinfo

Modified: head/mail/dbmail/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/dbmail/Makefile	Fri Jan  3 19:31:31 2014	(r338575)
+++ head/mail/dbmail/Makefile	Fri Jan  3 19:36:06 2014	(r338576)
@@ -2,9 +2,10 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	dbmail
-PORTVERSION=	3.1.7
+PORTVERSION=	3.1.9
 CATEGORIES=	mail
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.dbmail.org/download/3.1/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.dbmail.org/download/3.1/ \
+		http://git.dbmail.eu/paul/dbmail/snapshot/
 
 MAINTAINER=	ahicks@p-o.co.uk
 COMMENT=	SQL database-based mail system (POP3 and IMAP)
@@ -22,7 +23,7 @@ BUILD_DEPENDS+=	asciidoc:${PORTSDIR}/tex
 
 CONFLICTS=	dbmail-2.* dbmail22-[0-9]*
 
-OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS LDAP SIEVE THREADS
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	LDAP SIEVE THREADS
 OPTIONS_DEFAULT=	THREADS
 SIEVE_DESC=	Build with support for Sieve mail sorting language
 

Modified: head/mail/dbmail/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/dbmail/distinfo	Fri Jan  3 19:31:31 2014	(r338575)
+++ head/mail/dbmail/distinfo	Fri Jan  3 19:36:06 2014	(r338576)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (dbmail-3.1.7.tar.gz) = 657965a87a217495b2bd5f292ef1b4948e85d195e54e9c0e4981d46cf72427aa
-SIZE (dbmail-3.1.7.tar.gz) = 2395315
+SHA256 (dbmail-3.1.9.tar.gz) = 665f42700654aae767d24647dde284a4df7aec1702a00d1122d55b3f9f4318dd
+SIZE (dbmail-3.1.9.tar.gz) = 2397293
